note: Seed products for the knowledge graph. merchantRef values are placeholders — the ingestion connectors (see docs/ARCHITECTURE.md) will populate real ASINs/listing IDs. Card art is emoji-on-pastel until the image pipeline is ported from RenoGuide.

products.name: Strawberry Cow Plush
products.blurb: A milkshake-pink cow with a strawberry hood. The internet's favourite emotional support bovine.

products.name: Hirono Little Mischief Blind Box
products.blurb: POP MART's moody little art toy. One box, thirteen possible figures, one secret chase.

products.name: Sonny Angel Hippers Series
products.blurb: The tiny cherub that clings to your phone, monitor and heart. Blind-box format, big feelings.

products.name: Jellycat Bartholomew Bear
products.blurb: Impossibly soft, quietly smug. The gateway Jellycat that starts a whole shelf.

products.name: Miffy First Light Lamp
products.blurb: A rechargeable, dimmable Miffy that glows like a tiny moon. Nursery-grade cute, design-museum pedigree.

products.name: Floating Cloud Shelf Set
products.blurb: Three chunky cloud shelves for displaying blind boxes, plushies and other small treasures.

products.name: Mushroom Fairy Lamp
products.blurb: A hand-blown glass mushroom that glows amber at dusk. Cottagecore's favourite night light.

products.name: Checkered Daisy Rug
products.blurb: Danish pastel checkerboard with a daisy in the corner. Instantly softens any floor.

products.name: Wavy Squiggle Mirror
products.blurb: The Instagram-famous wiggle mirror in blush. Makes every selfie 20% dreamier.

products.name: Smoko Tayto Toast Ambient Light
products.blurb: A squishy piece of toast that lights up when you boop it. Desk morale, solved.

products.name: Capybara Desk Organiser
products.blurb: A chill capybara holds your pens, clips and emotional stability in its ceramic hot spring.

products.name: Pink Cloud 65% Mechanical Keyboard
products.blurb: Thocky switches, pudding keycaps, blush-and-cream colourway. Cute enough for the desk tour.

products.name: Bunny Ears Sticky Page Flags
products.blurb: 600 pastel page flags with tiny ears. Turns any planner into a small meadow.

products.name: Hello Kitty 50th Anniversary Figure
products.blurb: Sanrio's golden-bow anniversary figure. The one collectors will wish they'd bought at retail.

products.name: Cinnamoroll Café Diorama Kit
products.blurb: Build a miniature pastel café for your figures, one tiny croissant at a time.

products.name: Heart Handle Mug Duo
products.blurb: Two stoneware mugs with chunky heart handles. Morning coffee, but make it romantic.

products.name: Satin Ribbon Hair Claw Set
products.blurb: Four oversized claws wrapped in satin bows. Coquette's easiest entry point.

products.name: Rubber Duck String Lights
products.blurb: Twenty tiny glowing ducks on a string. Absurd. Essential.

products.name: Pastel Moon Phase Wall Hanging
products.blurb: Five ceramic moons fading from blush to lilac on a golden thread.

products.name: Wicker Heart Picnic Basket Bag
products.blurb: A heart-shaped wicker bag that works for picnics, farmers markets and main-character walks.

products.name: Loch Ness Dino Tea Infuser
products.blurb: A tiny mint dinosaur periscopes out of your mug while your tea steeps.

products.name: Y2K Flip Phone Compact Mirror
products.blurb: A pink flip-phone that opens to a mirror. Serving 2003 from your handbag.

products.name: Coquette Bow Desk Mat
products.blurb: An extra-large cream desk mat scattered with hand-drawn pink bows.

products.name: Raincloud Desk Humidifier
products.blurb: A little cloud that drips glowing rain into a pool while it humidifies your desk air.

products.name: Beginner Kawaii Crochet Kit
products.blurb: Everything to crochet your first tiny whale, including the courage. No experience needed.

products.name: Sparkly Strawberry Hair Ties
products.blurb: Glitter-filled strawberry hair ties — four dollars of pure main-character energy.

products.name: A6 Travel Neko Notebook
products.blurb: A pocket notebook starring a travelling cat — for lists, doodles and tiny adventures.

products.name: Japanese Summer Stickers - Happy Rabbits
products.blurb: Happy rabbits enjoying Japanese summer — sticker-sheet serotonin for planners and laptops.

products.name: Chiikawa Sushi  DIY Candy Kit
products.blurb: Build your own candy sushi with Chiikawa — dinner and a craft project, both edible.

products.name: PRE-ORDER | Re-ment Kirby of the Star - Adventure on Desk
products.blurb: Re-Ment's Kirby desk-adventure miniatures — blind-box format, maximum desk delight.

products.name: Mofusand Kitty Ribbon Memo Pad - Limited Spring Edition
products.blurb: Mofusand kittens in ribbons on a limited spring memo pad — notes too cute to throw away.

products.name: Sanrio Character Chopstick Rest
products.blurb: Tiny Sanrio characters holding your chopsticks between bites — dinner-table cuteness, solved.

products.name: Hello Kitty Petite Tumbler Cup
products.blurb: A petite Hello Kitty tumbler for desk hydration with maximum charm per millilitre.

products.name: Rilakkuma Clear File Case - Pink
products.blurb: Rilakkuma keeping your papers together in pink — bureaucracy has never been this relaxed.

products.name: Studio Ghibli Pocket Bell Charm - My Neighbor Totoro - Catbus
products.blurb: A Catbus bell charm that jingles from your bag — a tiny piece of Ghibli to carry around.

products.name: Hello Kitty and Friends 2027 Retro Deluxe Compact Flexi Planner
products.blurb: A 2027 planner in Sanrio's dreamiest retro art — suddenly you're the organised friend.

products.name: Hello Kitty and Friends x Pentel EnerGel RTX Liquid Gel Pen (Mix 2 - 5-Pk)
products.blurb: Pentel EnerGel smoothness wearing Hello Kitty and friends — meeting notes, but joyful.

products.name: My Melody x Strawberry Shortcake Cosmetic Bag
products.blurb: My Melody meets Strawberry Shortcake on one cosmetic bag — a crossover for the girlies.

products.name: Pitatto Friends Plush Kuromi French Maid Outfit (Medium)
products.blurb: Kuromi in a French maid outfit, ready to perch on your shelf and judge your décor.

products.name: My Melody Winter Mascot Plush
products.blurb: My Melody bundled up for winter — a seasonal mascot plush that retires when the snow does.

products.name: Renn Mochi Slippers
products.blurb: Mochi-soft slippers that turn your floor into a cloud and your feet into an aesthetic.
